execution_analysis.suggested_action: regenerate the affected layer or component template
evidence_lines: ***** FATAL: Could not process input files.

repair_recommendation.suggested_action: regenerate the affected layer or component template

preconditions: apply the recommended repair at the routed stage
rerun static_checker_v1 after the repair changes the script text
rerun mission.exe only after the regenerated script passes static verification

repaired_text:
platform_type BrawlerFighter WSF_BRAWLER_PLATFORM
  mover BrawlerMover WSF_BRAWLER_MOVER
    max_speed 1.2 mach
    climb_rate 50000 ft/min
    turn_rate 15 deg/s
  end_mover
  sensor BrawlerSensor WSF_GEOMETRIC_SENSOR
    azimuth_field_of_view 60 deg
    elevation_field_of_view 30 deg
    maximum_range 50 nm
    frame_time 1 sec
  end_sensor
  weapon Sidewinder WSF_AIR_TO_AIR_MISSILE
    quantity 2
  end_weapon
  processor BrawlerThinker WSF_BRAWLER_PROCESSOR
  end_processor
  processor Perception WSF_PERCEPTION_PROCESSOR
  end_processor
  processor IncomingThreats WSF_THREAT_PROCESSOR
  end_processor
  processor DataMgr WSF_TRACK_PROCESSOR
  end_processor
end_platform_type

platform blue_1 BrawlerFighter
  side blue
  position 0.03s 0.01w
  altitude 10000 ft msl
end_platform

platform red_1 BrawlerFighter
  side red
  position 0.03n 0.01e
  altitude 10000 ft msl
end_platform

event_pipe
  file output/brawler_1v1.aer
end_event_pipe

event_output
  file output/brawler_1v1.evt
  disable all
  enable PLATFORM_ADDED
end_event_output

end_time 300 sec

findings.message: WSF_AIR_TO_AIR_MISSILE cannot be used directly as a standalone weapon block type; use a self-contained explicit weapon profile or omit the weapon block
